keyboard_help.c(3) Library Functions Manual keyboard_help.c(3)

NAME

keyboard_help.c - Keyboard help overlay TUI rendering implementation.

SYNOPSIS

Macros


#define ENABLED_COLOR LOG_COLOR_INFO /* Green */
#define DISABLED_COLOR LOG_COLOR_ERROR /* Red */
#define APPEND(fmt, ...)

Functions


void keyboard_help_render (session_display_ctx_t *ctx)
Render keyboard help centered on terminal.

Detailed Description

Keyboard help overlay TUI rendering implementation.

Definition in file keyboard_help.c.

Macro Definition Documentation

#define APPEND( fmt, ...)

Value:

do {                                                                                                                 \


  int written = snprintf(buffer + buf_pos, BUFFER_SIZE - buf_pos, fmt, ##__VA_ARGS__);                               \


  if (written > 0) {                                                                                                 \


    buf_pos += written;                                                                                              \


  }                                                                                                                  \
} while (0)

Function
  Documentation




void
  keyboard_help_render (session_display_ctx_t * ctx)


Render keyboard help centered on terminal.


Definition at line 318 of file keyboard_help.c.


318                                                       {
319   if (!ctx) {
320     log_error("keyboard_help_render: ctx is NULL!");
321     return;
322   }
323 
324   log_info("keyboard_help_render: STARTING");
325 
326   // Get terminal dimensions
327   int term_width = (int)terminal_get_effective_width();
328   int term_height = (int)terminal_get_effective_height();
329   log_info("keyboard_help_render: term_width=%d, term_height=%d", term_width, term_height);
330 
331   // Use available terminal width, capped at preferred width
332   int box_width = term_width;
333   if (box_width > 48)
334     box_width = 48; // Cap at preferred width
335   if (box_width < 30)
336     box_width = 30; // Absolute minimum for readability
337 
338   // Calculate centering position (true mathematical centering)
339   // Horizontal centering
340   int start_col = (term_width - box_width) / 2;
341   if (start_col < 0) {
342     start_col = 0;
343   }
344 
345   // Calculate box height dynamically based on content
346   // With animations separator line added, the standard help screen is 25 rows
347   int box_height = 25;
348 
349   // Vertical centering with dynamic box height
350   int start_row = (term_height - box_height) / 2 - 3; // -3 offset for proper vertical centering
351   if (start_row < 0) {
352     start_row = 0;
353   }
354 
355   // Build help screen content
356   const size_t BUFFER_SIZE = 8192; // Increased from 4096 to ensure all content fits
357   char *buffer = SAFE_MALLOC(BUFFER_SIZE, char *);
358   size_t buf_pos = 0;
359 
360 #define APPEND(fmt, ...)                                                                                               \
361   do {                                                                                                                 \
362     int written = snprintf(buffer + buf_pos, BUFFER_SIZE - buf_pos, fmt, ##__VA_ARGS__);                               \
363     if (written > 0) {                                                                                                 \
364       buf_pos += written;                                                                                              \
365     }                                                                                                                  \
366   } while (0)
367 
368   // Clear screen and position cursor
369   APPEND("\033[2J"); // Clear screen
370   APPEND("\033[H");  // Cursor to home
371 
372   // Build help screen with proper spacing using UTF-8 width-aware padding
373   char line_buf[256];
374   char border_buf[256];
375 
376   // Generate top border
377   APPEND("\033[%d;%dH", start_row + 1, start_col + 1);
378   border_buf[0] = '\0';
379   strcat(border_buf, "╔");
380   for (int i = 1; i < box_width - 1; i++)
381     strcat(border_buf, "═");
382   strcat(border_buf, "╗");
383   APPEND("%s", border_buf);
384 
385   // Title
386   APPEND("\033[%d;%dH", start_row + 2, start_col + 1);
387   build_help_line(line_buf, sizeof(line_buf), "ascii-chat Keyboard Shortcuts", box_width);
388   APPEND("%s", line_buf);
389 
390   // Generate separator border
391   APPEND("\033[%d;%dH", start_row + 3, start_col + 1);
392   border_buf[0] = '\0';
393   strcat(border_buf, "╠");
394   for (int i = 1; i < box_width - 1; i++)
395     strcat(border_buf, "═");
396   strcat(border_buf, "╣");
397   APPEND("%s", border_buf);
398 
399   // Navigation section
400   int current_row = 4;
401   append_help_line(buffer, &buf_pos, BUFFER_SIZE, start_row, &current_row, start_col, box_width,
402                    "Navigation & Control:");
403   append_help_line(buffer, &buf_pos, BUFFER_SIZE, start_row, &current_row, start_col, box_width,
404                    "─────────────────────");
405   append_help_line(buffer, &buf_pos, BUFFER_SIZE, start_row, &current_row, start_col, box_width,
406                    "?       Toggle this help screen");
407   append_help_line(buffer, &buf_pos, BUFFER_SIZE, start_row, &current_row, start_col, box_width,
408                    "Esc     Close help / Quit app");
409 
410   // Check if media is provided (only show Space/Seek keys if media is loaded)
411   const char *media_url = GET_OPTION(media_url);
412   const char *media_file = GET_OPTION(media_file);
413   bool has_media = (media_url && strlen(media_url) > 0) || (media_file && strlen(media_file) > 0);
414 
415   if (has_media) {
416     append_help_line(buffer, &buf_pos, BUFFER_SIZE, start_row, &current_row, start_col, box_width,
417                      "Space   Play/Pause (files only)");
418     append_help_line(buffer, &buf_pos, BUFFER_SIZE, start_row, &current_row, start_col, box_width,
419                      "← / →   Seek backward/forward 30s");
420   }
421 
422   append_help_line(buffer, &buf_pos, BUFFER_SIZE, start_row, &current_row, start_col, box_width,
423                    "m / M   Mute/Unmute audio");
424   append_help_line(buffer, &buf_pos, BUFFER_SIZE, start_row, &current_row, start_col, box_width,
425                    "↑ / ↓   Volume up/down (10%)");
426   append_help_line(buffer, &buf_pos, BUFFER_SIZE, start_row, &current_row, start_col, box_width,
427                    "c / C   Cycle color mode");
428   append_help_line(buffer, &buf_pos, BUFFER_SIZE, start_row, &current_row, start_col, box_width,
429                    "f / F   Cycle color filter");
430   append_help_line(buffer, &buf_pos, BUFFER_SIZE, start_row, &current_row, start_col, box_width,
431                    "x / X   Flip webcam horizontally");
432   append_help_line(buffer, &buf_pos, BUFFER_SIZE, start_row, &current_row, start_col, box_width,
433                    "y / Y   Flip webcam vertically");
434   append_help_line(buffer, &buf_pos, BUFFER_SIZE, start_row, &current_row, start_col, box_width,
435                    "r / R   Cycle render mode");
436 
437 #ifndef NDEBUG
438   append_help_line(buffer, &buf_pos, BUFFER_SIZE, start_row, &current_row, start_col, box_width,
439                    "`       Print current sync primitive state");
440 #endif
441 
442   // Blank line before settings section
443   append_help_line(buffer, &buf_pos, BUFFER_SIZE, start_row, &current_row, start_col, box_width, "");
444 
445   // Current settings section
446   append_help_line(buffer, &buf_pos, BUFFER_SIZE, start_row, &current_row, start_col, box_width, "Current Settings:");
447   append_help_line(buffer, &buf_pos, BUFFER_SIZE, start_row, &current_row, start_col, box_width, "───────────────");
448 
449   // Get current option values
450   double current_volume = GET_OPTION(speakers_volume);
451   int current_color_mode = (int)GET_OPTION(color_mode);
452   int current_render_mode = (int)GET_OPTION(render_mode);
453   color_filter_t current_color_filter = GET_OPTION(color_filter);
454   bool flip_x = (bool)GET_OPTION(flip_x);
455   bool flip_y = (bool)GET_OPTION(flip_y);
456   bool current_audio = (bool)GET_OPTION(audio_enabled);
457 
458   // Format volume bar as "[========  ] 80%"
459   char volume_bar[32];
460   format_volume_bar(current_volume, volume_bar, sizeof(volume_bar));
461 
462   // Get string values
463   const char *color_str = color_mode_to_string(current_color_mode);
464   const char *filter_str = color_filter_to_string(current_color_filter);
465   const char *render_str = render_mode_to_string(current_render_mode);
466 
467   // Create status indicators for flip, audio, and matrix rain
468   // Format flip status as "rows=X/O cols=X/O" (rows=flip_y, cols=flip_x)
469   char flip_status[64];
470   snprintf(flip_status, sizeof(flip_status), "rows=%s cols=%s", status_indicator(flip_y), status_indicator(flip_x));
471 
472   const char *audio_text = status_indicator(current_audio);
473   bool matrix_rain_enabled = GET_OPTION(matrix_rain);
474   const char *matrix_text = status_indicator(matrix_rain_enabled);
475 
476   // Build settings lines with UTF-8 width-aware padding (ordered to match keybinds: m, ↑/↓, c, f, x/y, r)
477   append_settings_line(buffer, &buf_pos, BUFFER_SIZE, start_row, &current_row, start_col, box_width, "Audio",
478                        audio_text, 6);
479   append_settings_line(buffer, &buf_pos, BUFFER_SIZE, start_row, &current_row, start_col, box_width, "Volume",
480                        volume_bar, 6);
481   append_settings_line(buffer, &buf_pos, BUFFER_SIZE, start_row, &current_row, start_col, box_width, "Color", color_str,
482                        6);
483   append_settings_line(buffer, &buf_pos, BUFFER_SIZE, start_row, &current_row, start_col, box_width, "Filter",
484                        filter_str, 6);
485   append_settings_line(buffer, &buf_pos, BUFFER_SIZE, start_row, &current_row, start_col, box_width, "Render",
486                        render_str, 6);
487   append_settings_line(buffer, &buf_pos, BUFFER_SIZE, start_row, &current_row, start_col, box_width, "Flip",
488                        flip_status, 6);
489 
490   // Blank line before animations section
491   append_help_line(buffer, &buf_pos, BUFFER_SIZE, start_row, &current_row, start_col, box_width, "");
492 
493   // Animations section
494   append_help_line(buffer, &buf_pos, BUFFER_SIZE, start_row, &current_row, start_col, box_width,
495                    "Animations (number key toggle):");
496   append_help_line(buffer, &buf_pos, BUFFER_SIZE, start_row, &current_row, start_col, box_width,
497                    "───────────────────────────────");
498 
499   // Format: "(0) Matrix \"Digital Rain\" : X/O"
500   char animation_line[256];
501   snprintf(animation_line, sizeof(animation_line), "(0) Matrix \"Digital Rain\" : %s", matrix_text);
502   append_help_line(buffer, &buf_pos, BUFFER_SIZE, start_row, &current_row, start_col, box_width, animation_line);
503 
504   // FPS Counter toggle
505   char fps_line[256];
506   snprintf(fps_line, sizeof(fps_line), "(-) FPS Counter : %s", status_indicator(GET_OPTION(fps_counter)));
507   append_help_line(buffer, &buf_pos, BUFFER_SIZE, start_row, &current_row, start_col, box_width, fps_line);
508 
509   // Blank line before footer
510   append_help_line(buffer, &buf_pos, BUFFER_SIZE, start_row, &current_row, start_col, box_width, "");
511 
512   // Footer
513   append_help_line(buffer, &buf_pos, BUFFER_SIZE, start_row, &current_row, start_col, box_width, "Press ? to close");
514 
515   // Bottom border
516   int remaining_buf = BUFFER_SIZE - buf_pos;
517   int written = snprintf(buffer + buf_pos, remaining_buf, "\033[%d;%dH", start_row + current_row, start_col + 1);
518   if (written > 0) {
519     buf_pos += written;
520   }
521   border_buf[0] = '\0';
522   strcat(border_buf, "╚");
523   for (int i = 1; i < box_width - 1; i++)
524     strcat(border_buf, "═");
525   strcat(border_buf, "╝");
526   written = snprintf(buffer + buf_pos, BUFFER_SIZE - buf_pos, "%s", border_buf);
527   if (written > 0) {
528     buf_pos += written;
529   }
530 
531 #undef APPEND
532 
533   log_info("keyboard_help_render: buffer prepared, buf_pos=%zu", buf_pos);
534 
535   // Write buffer to terminal
536   session_display_write_raw(ctx, buffer, buf_pos);
537   log_info("keyboard_help_render: buffer written to terminal");
538 
539   // Flush output
540   if (ctx && session_display_has_tty(ctx)) {
541     int tty_fd = session_display_get_tty_fd(ctx);
542     log_info("keyboard_help_render: tty_fd=%d", tty_fd);
543     if (tty_fd >= 0) {
544       (void)terminal_flush(tty_fd);
545       log_info("keyboard_help_render: terminal flushed");
546     }
547   }
548 
549   SAFE_FREE(buffer);
550   log_info("keyboard_help_render: COMPLETE");
551 }






References APPEND, bool,
    color_mode_to_string(), render_mode_to_string(),
    session_display_get_tty_fd(), session_display_has_tty(),
    session_display_write_raw(), terminal_flush(),
    terminal_get_effective_height(), and
    terminal_get_effective_width().


Referenced by display_render_frame(),
    session_handle_keyboard_input(), and
  session_render_loop().
